User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user within the Hosana City Housing Management System, with specific roles and access levels.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The unique email address of the user.

role.description: The assigned role of the user, determining their access and permissions within the system. (Possible values: Mayor, Sub-city Official, Kebele Officer)

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number for the user.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the user's account is active or inactive.

language.description: The user's preferred language for the application.

subCityId.description: Reference to the SubCity this user is associated with, if applicable (e.g., for Sub-city officials). (Relationship: SubCity 1:N User)

kebeleId.description: Reference to the Kebele this user is associated with, if applicable (e.g., for Kebele officers). (Relationship: Kebele 1:N User)

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the user account information was updated.

SubCity.title: SubCity
SubCity.description: Represents a sub-city, which is the highest administrative division in the Hosana City administrative hierarchy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SubCity entity.

name.description: The unique name of the sub-city.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the sub-city record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the sub-city record was updated.

Kebele.title: Kebele
Kebele.description: Represents a kebele, an administrative division nested within a SubCity.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Kebele entity.

subCityId.description: Reference to the SubCity to which this kebele belongs.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude of the kebele's center point.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude of the kebele's center point.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the kebele record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the kebele record was updated.

Ketena.title: Ketena
Ketena.description: Represents a ketena (neighborhood), the lowest administrative division, nested within a Kebele.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Ketena entity.

kebeleId.description: Reference to the Kebele to which this ketena belongs.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the ketena record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the ketena record was updated.

House.title: House
House.description: Represents a single housing record, including details about the house, its location, and the householder.

id.description: Unique identifier for the House entity.

houseNumber.description: A unique identifying number assigned to the house within its administrative division.

subCityId.description: Reference to the SubCity where the house is located.

kebeleId.description: Reference to the Kebele where the house is located.

ketenaId.description: Reference to the Ketena where the house is located.

householderName.description: The full name of the primary householder or head of the household.

phoneNumber.description: The contact phone number of the householder.

nationalId.description: The national ID number of the householder (optional field).

familySize.description: The total number of individuals residing in the household.

houseType.description: The type of ownership or tenure for the house. (Possible values: owned, rented, government)

addressDescription.description: A comprehensive textual description of the house's full address.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude coordinate of the house's location.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude coordinate of the house's location.

createdBy.description: Reference to the User who created this housing record.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the housing record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the housing record was updated.

AuditLog.title: AuditLog
AuditLog.description: Records all significant user actions (create, update, delete) on data entities for accountability and historical tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AuditLog entry.

userId.description: Reference to the User who performed the action.

action.description: The type of action performed (e.g., CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE).

tableName.description: The name of the database table or entity affected by the action.

recordId.description: The unique identifier of the specific record within the tableName that was affected.

timestamp.description: The date and time when the action was performed.

description.description: An optional detailed description of the audit event, including changes made.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Includes role and associated `subCityId` or `kebeleId` for role-based and location-based access control.
Kebeles nested within a SubCity. Each document includes denormalized 'subCityId'.
Ketenas nested within a Kebele. Includes denormalized 'subCityId' and 'kebeleId' for efficient queries.
Primary collection for housing records. Each document includes denormalized 'subCityId', 'kebeleId', and 'ketenaId' for efficient, secure filtering.
Records all significant user actions for accountability.
